full_text:
Cao Quan (Jingyuan) 曹全 (景完)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Quan (曹全), styledJingyuan (景完), was born in Dunhuang. Helped defeat the Turbans, a generous offical who was much admired. Cao Quan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
